aboutPanel.title: About
aboutPanel.tagline: A template for building desktop apps
aboutPanel.description: A professional template application for building cross-platform desktop applications with Tauri, React, and TypeScript. Includes a ribbon UI, custom titlebar, theme system, and more.
aboutPanel.companyDescription: Building professional open source desktop applications with modern web technologies. Transparent pricing, transparent code.

importPanel.title: Import
importPanel.fromFileDesc: Import data from supported file formats
importPanel.fromTemplateDesc: Load a pre-built template as a starting point

exportPanel.title: Export
exportPanel.asPdfDesc: Save the current document as a PDF file
exportPanel.asImageDesc: Save as PNG or JPEG image files
exportPanel.asHtmlDesc: Export the document as an HTML file
